name: agent-hive
description: Context-Driven Development for AI coding assistants

scripts.build: bun run --filter hive-core build && bun run --filter oc-arkive build && bun run --filter @tctinh/agent-hive-mcp build && bun run --filter claude-code-hive build && bun run --filter vscode-hive build
scripts.build:opencode: bun run --filter hive-core build && bun run --filter oc-arkive build
scripts.dev: bun run --filter hive-core build && bun run --filter '*' dev
scripts.release:check: bun install && node --test release-artifacts.test.mjs && node --test release-workflow.test.mjs && bun run build:opencode && bun run --filter hive-core test && bun run --filter oc-arkive test
